name: ?? Movie Theater
short_description: This is a funny movie theater where you can watch any kind of movie. I saw a movie here. It is a story of a high school boy “Sota Sakurai” until ※※※※※※.
detailed_description:
?? Movie Theater is a narrative oriented psychological horror in which one high school boy experiences what happened to him.

▼Story

This is a funny movie theater where you can watch any kind of movie. I saw a movie here. It is a story of a high school boy “Sota Sakurai” until ※※※※※※.

▼Game Features

・First-person horror game.

・A psychological terror in which the protagonist's world gradually collapses.

・An epic story that unfolds from the daily life of one high school boy to the secrets of the world and his outlook on life.

・Game design that emphasizes storytelling, does not require high play skill, and makes it easy to reach the ending.

・Two endings + one hidden ending.

▼Estimated playing time

About 1.5 to 3 hours

▼ About Video Distribution

・Distribution is available to both individuals and corporations without permission.

・Monetization is only possible when using the functions provided by the video distribution site.

・We would appreciate it if you include the name of the game in the title of your video or live broadcast, or include a link to the Steam page in the summary section.

We will not be liable for any damages caused by the distribution of videos of this game.

The contents of these guidelines are subject to change without notice.
